debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
inst✝¹ : Preorder α
inst✝ : Preorder β
F :
  @CategoryInContext.Functor α β (@CategoryInContext.Category.Preorder α inst✝¹)
    (@CategoryInContext.Category.Preorder β inst✝)
⊢ ∃ f,
    Monotone f ∧
      ∀ (x : α),
        @CategoryInContext.Functor.F α β (@CategoryInContext.Category.Preorder α inst✝¹)
            (@CategoryInContext.Category.Preorder β inst✝) F x =
          f x

proof:
refine ⟨F.F, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro x y hxy
    have : PLift (F.F x ≤ F.F y) := F.homF ⟨hxy⟩
    exact this.down
  · intro x
    rfl
